description: §38.13.1 — a `<channel watches=>` feed on a non-Postgres (sqlite) driver fires E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-DRIVER. The v1 change-capture substrate is Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY (§38.13.7 — the only substrate the compiler fully owns/emits); watches= REQUIRES the postgres driver.
rationale: §38.13.1: `watches=` REQUIRES a Postgres database. On the sqlite/mysql driver it SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-DRIVER — the LISTEN/NOTIFY capture is Postgres-only in v1.
